# c43 pool/GMP leak-scan baseline
# Known findings on upstream master, generated by 
# The gate (scripts/test/run-leakscan.sh) fails on any finding NOT listed here.
# Format: <mode> <kind> <identifier>
#
# Triage (see __DEV/reports/REPORT-4-BUGS.md):
# - leakscan LEAK item=1645 fnXToAlphaOld GMP leak - REAL, fix on branch
# fix/longint-leak-x-to-alpha-old (not yet upstream).
# - leakscan LEAK item=1202/1203/1465/1889/2412/2413 - persistent state
# (named vars / equations / refresh), not orphan leaks.
# - keyscan LEAK seq=equation_x80 - persistent equations CLEAR ALL keeps;
# create+delete is clean.
# - CRASH item=... - handlers called out of keyboard/menu context.
# - leakscan LEAK item=1529/2386/2404 - matrix-editor (M.EDIT/EDIT) persistent
#   state, surfaced now that the leak scan rotates matrix/vector operands too.
#
# An out-of-RAM fault-injection scan (--oomscan) was trialled and removed: its
# getFreeRamMemory-delta leak metric is confounded by free-list fragmentation and
# yielded no reliable matrix finding. See __DEV/reports/REPORT-11.
# Remove a line here only when the underlying finding is fixed upstream.
